NoticeData.Contents:
## Content Balance Adjustments

World Boss — Wave and Reward Rebalance

World Boss has been rebalanced across all waves, with adjustments to boss stats, damage scaling, and reward distribution per wave to better align with player effort and progression. These changes will take effect from the next season. The currently ongoing season will conclude under the existing rules, and the reworked balance and rewards will apply starting from the following season.

Custom Equipment — Grade and Balance Rework

The Custom Equipment system has been reworked. Equipment grade structure has been revised, and stat ranges and craft outcomes have been re-tuned across all grades for a more meaningful crafting experience.

## NCU

RB Final Teaser Banner

The final teaser banner for the upcoming Rune Battle (RB) season is now live in-game. Players can preview the runes available in the first RB season and start planning ahead.

## Game Improvements

New Transcendent Costumes

- Two new Grade 8 (Transcendent) costumes have been added to the Costume Summon pool.
- With this update, the two previously available Grade 8 (Transcendent) costumes can no longer be obtained through Costume Summon or Synthesis.
New Transcendent Titles

New Transcendent Titles

- Two new Grade 8 (Transcendent) titles have been added to the Mileage Shop.

New Transcendent Runes — Heimdall Pair + Idun's Apple

- Two new Grade 8 (Transcendent) runes have been added to the Rune Summon pool.

One additional Grade 8 (Transcendent) rune has been added as a Monster Collection reward, and adventure boss pass.

Summon Premium Effect Threshold Changed

The threshold for triggering the premium summon visual effect has been raised. Previously, the effect played when a Legendary or higher grade item was included in the summon result. It now plays only when a Mythic or higher grade item is included, preserving the premium moment for truly rare pulls.

## Bug Fixes

Fixed an issue where the Critical Damage (CDMG) Collection bonus was not being correctly applied to player stats. After this update, CDMG values from collections will be calculated and reflected as intended.
------------------------------

# New Event Dungeon — Bifrost Gate A new limited-time event dungeon has been added. - Two exclusive event materials are introduced for the Bifrost Gate - These materials are used to complete event-exclusive collections that provide meaningful stat boosts to support player progression - Completing all 12 collections requires a combination of dungeon clearing and package purchases # New Runes — PETPOP New Grade 8 (Transcendent) skill runes have been added as part of the NCU collaboration. - Freya PETPOP Rune: A survival-oriented hybrid rune with HP, DEF, and SPD stats, plus an ATK buff skill. Adventure only. # Game Improvements Buff Limit Adjustments The upper limits for several stat buff/debuff skills have been increased to accommodate higher-tier gameplay: Skill Stat Previous Limit New Limit ATK Boost ATK +15,000,000 +150,000,000 ATK Reduction ATK - 15,000,000 - 150,000,000 SPD Boost SPD +15,000,000 +150,000,000 HIT Boost HIT +15,000,000 +200,000,000 HIT Reduction HIT - 15,000,000 - 200,000,000 Synthesis Cost Reduction The number of materials required for equipment synthesis has been reduced across all grades. Lower grades receive a modest reduction, while mid-to-high grades see a more significant decrease. Synthesis Aura Grimoire Costume G1→G2 15 → 13 - - G2→G3 15 → 13 - - G3→G4 15 → 13 10 → 9 20 → 18 G4→G5 15 → 11 15 → 11 20 → 15 G5→G6 16 → 12 16 → 12 20 → 15 G6→G7 12 → 9 12 → 9 15 → 11 G7→G8 10 → 9 10 → 9 12 → 11 Bug Fixes - Fixed an issue where the PC launcher would display a white screen indefinitely when the node status was unstable

Nine Chronicles Hard World Open - Stages 451–470 Release - Content with significantly higher difficulty than existing worlds - To play Hard Mode world content, a Catalyst Potion is required in addition to the existing Action Points - Catalyst Potions can be obtained through Patrol Rewards and Monster Collection rewards - Catalyst Potions can also be obtained as rewards from stage clear quests Transcendent-grade craftable equipment - 10 types in total — 5 Fire-attribute and 5 Water-attribute pieces - Transcendent-grade equipment is designed to grow significantly stronger as it is enhanced. Game Improvement - 5 new collections related to Transcendent equipment and 1 new collection related to a new title have been added. ## Additional Updates - Detailed information regarding the new rune to be added through NCU - PETPOP will be shared in early April. - NCU's second title, Ragnarok Breaker, will be coming to you soon — thank you for your continued patience. - The update for Infinite Tower floors 101 and beyond will be scheduled for April, after we have had the opportunity to review participation numbers and equipment distribution among adventurers engaging with the new Hard Mode world.
